reload_equality.method: read-only recompute: ask-a-research-call.v1.json parsed twice with deep-equality; resolve_for_enrichment_pool(require_usable=True) resolved twice with identical packet_digest; run.json and ask-a journal byte hashes re-verified equal to the frozen output-inventory.v1.json pins

notes: Post-hoc verdict emitted at Story 38.1 closure per closure-party Winston Rider 1 (party-closure-record-38-1-38-3a-2026-07-15.md): a read-only recompute from the frozen on-disk journal and run envelope of trial a940c5eb-1043-42c1-a2a4-8a6301b6bcf4; zero provider/network calls were made and nothing under runs/ was modified.

attempt=3: attempt 1 = failing verdict 9d2ab3f1-7e6c-4d9a-b835-12c7e8f46031, attempt 2 = failing verdict c8f17a24-9b63-4e10-a5d7-6f2043bc9812; this is the first (and only) run of this trial id (first_run=true; HIL summary finished_at 2026-07-15T04:03:29Z, status=completed, success=true, run.json status=completed at terminal gate G4A).

Derivation difference vs failed-attempt verdicts: packet_sha256 is the canonical-JSON packet_digest returned by app.marcus.lesson_plan.research_packet.resolve_for_enrichment_pool(require_usable=True) over the frozen run.json (both prior verdicts carried null because Ask-A was never reached); it is a canonical payload digest, not a raw file-byte hash. envelope_sha256 / ask_a_journal_sha256 / hil_journal_sha256 / hil_summary_sha256 are raw file-byte sha256, matching the prior verdicts' derivation (envelope = runs/<trial>/run.json, empirically confirmed against both prior verdicts).

Derivation difference: predecessor_diagnosis here diagnoses the RESOLUTION of the attempt-2 failure (slide-07 matched 0 files): this run's workbook-slide-authority-map.v1.json shows 8/8 slides matched with zero unmatched slide ids under resolver exact-anchor-source-slide.v1. governed_correction_witness re-proves the attempt-1 lineage fix on this run's own artifacts: ratified-los.json sha256 equals the lesson plan's planning_provenance.ratified_los_digest.

zero_call_replay_proven=false: no replay receipt or cached-replay journal field exists in the frozen artifacts, and this read-only recompute did not re-enter the node live (doing so is forbidden here). The zero-call replay property is witnessed deterministically by test_one_dispatch_completed_journal_and_zero_call_replay (AC-2), not by this trial's artifacts; recorded honestly as unproven-from-artifacts, consistent with the template's proof standard.

doi_network_resolution_checked=false: DOI checks are offline-only (syntax validity, source_ref embedding, and match against the journal's scite provider_metadata.doi); no network resolution was attempted.
reliability_score=null is the journal's actual recorded value for ask-a-cite-001, not an ungroundable field.

ask_a carries additive grounded fields beyond the failed-attempt template arrays (journal_state, disposition, known_losses, output_digest, research_entry_count, covered/uncovered ability ids and bold terms): all copied verbatim from the frozen ask-a-research-call.v1.json; the template's arrays were empty on both failures so their element shape was defined here from the journal's own field names.
